Normalization of fission cross-section was made over

et al, Ann. Of Sci. and Eng., V1,No.718,1974.

errors. Systematic errors due to the background sub-
traction (ERR2) ,to the measurement of the probability
that a fission event record  as capture (ERR3),to the
measurement of the fission to capture efficiency ratio
(ERR4) and to the corrections (ERR5). These fractions
